name: mem_suggest_topic_key
description: Suggest a stable topic_key for memory upserts. Use this before mem_save when you want evolving topics (like architecture decisions) to update a single observation over time.

content.description: Observation content used as fallback if title is empty

title.description: Observation title (preferred input for stable keys)

type.description: Observation type/category, e.g. architecture, decision, bugfix
